summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PHASE 3.1 Action Application Engine. All 13 core backend tests passed successfully. Tested health check, state management, action validation, dry-run and real action application, safety guards, history tracking, system summary, asset configuration, calibration integration, edge cases, and cooldown mechanisms.
passed_tests: Adaptive Health Check - Module responds correctly with version 3.1 and 5 components
Get Adaptive State - Returns complete state with enabled/disabled assets, risk multipliers, thresholds
Validate Actions - Batch validation working with 100% approval rate for valid actions
Apply Actions (Dry Run) - Dry run mode working correctly, simulates without applying
Apply Real Actions - Real action application working, properly updates state and history
Safety Guard - Minimum Assets - Correctly blocks disabling assets when only 3 would remain
Get Action History - History tracking working, records all applied/rejected actions
Get System Summary - Summary endpoint provides comprehensive state and history overview
Get Asset Config - Asset-specific configuration retrieval working correctly
Calibration Integration (Mock) - Integration with calibration layer working, processes mock data
Invalid Action Type - Properly rejects unknown action types with appropriate error messages
Cooldown Mechanism - Action cooldown working correctly, prevents rapid successive changes
Risk Reduction Limits - Risk multiplier adjustments working within defined bounds
